title: Age-related Macular Degeneration Clinical Trial Pipeline: DelveInsight Highlights Major Advances, Transformative Therapies, and 90+ Leading Players Wheeling the Therapeutics Landscape
author: Delveinsight
description: DelveInsight's 2026 report reveals a robust AMD clinical trial pipeline with 90+ active players developing 100+ pipeline drugs across various clinical stages. The report highlights promising therapies including elamipretide, 4D-150, MK-8748, and SAR402663, with approximately 15+ drugs in late-stage development. Recent advances include Merck's Phase IIb/III trial initiation for MK-8748, 4D Molecular Therapeutics' Phase III enrollment completion for 4D-150, and FDA fast-track designation for SAR402663.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Advanced 4D-150 to Phase III with completed enrollment in 4FRONT-1 trial and positive interim data from Phase I/II PRISM trial; accelerating development program.
Initiated pivotal Phase IIb/III trial for MK-8748 (Tiespectus), a novel bispecific antibody for wet AMD, demonstrating commitment to advancing next-generation therapies.
Acquired Adverum Biotechnologies and its lead product ixoberogene soroparvovec (Ixo-vec) in Phase III development for wet AMD.
Completed Phase II pivotal trials (ATMOSPHERE and ASCENT) for RGX-314 in wet AMD with topline data expected in 2026.
Developing SAR402663, a one-time intravitreal gene therapy for neovascular AMD that received FDA fast-track designation in September 2025.

title: [Latest] Global GLP-1 Receptor Agonist Market Size/Share Worth USD 95.3 Billion by 2035 at a 12.1% CAGR: Healthcare Foresights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, Value, SWOT Analysis)
author: Healthcare Foresights
description: The global GLP-1 receptor agonist market, valued at USD 28.7 billion in 2025, is projected to grow to USD 95.3 billion by 2035 at a 12.1% CAGR. Growth is driven by rising type 2 diabetes and obesity cases, technological innovations including oral formulations, and expanded insurance coverage. North America leads the market while Asia Pacific shows the highest growth rate.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a key market player in the rapidly growing GLP-1 receptor agonist market with strong market presence and expected continued growth through 2035.
Key market player with recent positive development: advanced orforglipron (oral GLP-1 agonist) with positive Phase 3 results in December 2025, positioning for potential 2026 approval and launch.

title: FDA OKs Sanofi Diabetes Drug In Newly Diagnosed Pediatric Patients
author: Vandana Singh
description: The FDA has granted accelerated approval to Sanofi's Tzield (teplizumab-mzwv) to delay the decline of endogenous insulin production in children ages 8 to 17 recently diagnosed with stage 3 type 1 diabetes. The approval was based on Phase 3 PROTECT study data showing Tzield significantly slowed the decline in C-peptide levels versus placebo. This expands the drug's use following an earlier April 2026 label expansion for stage 2 disease patients as young as 1 year old.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: FDA approval of Tzield for newly diagnosed pediatric T1D patients represents a significant label expansion and regulatory milestone. The drug demonstrated clinical efficacy in slowing beta-cell function decline. However, the stock was down 0.97% at publication, suggesting the market may have already priced in this approval or had other concerns.

title: Osteoarthritis Market Expected to Showcase Moderate Growth at a CAGR of 3% During the Forecast Period (2026–2036) Driven by Emerging Therapies and Rising Disease Burden | DelveInsight
author: Delveinsight
description: The osteoarthritis market is projected to grow at a 3% CAGR from 2026 to 2036, reaching USD 32.5 billion in 2025 across seven major markets. Growth is driven by an aging population, rising disease prevalence, and the launch of emerging therapies including LEVI-04, ZILOSUL, TissueGene-C, and AMZ001. Current treatment is dominated by opioids, but novel disease-modifying therapies and regenerative medicine approaches are expected to reshape the market landscape.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: PCRX-201 (enekinragene inzadenovec), a gene therapy candidate, is highlighted as an emerging therapy expected to transform the osteoarthritis market landscape.
SAR446959 is listed among leading emerging osteoarthritis candidates expected to address unmet treatment needs and contribute to market expansion.

title: Press Release: Sanofi’s Tzield approved in the US as the first disease-modifying therapy for patients recently diagnosed with stage 3 type 1 diabetes
author: Sanofi
description: The FDA has granted accelerated approval to Sanofi's Tzield (teplizumab-mzwv) for children aged 8-17 years recently diagnosed with stage 3 type 1 diabetes, making it the first disease-modifying therapy for this indication. The approval is based on the PROTECT phase 3 study showing significant slowing of C-peptide decline compared to placebo. A confirmatory BETA-PRESERVE study is ongoing.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Sanofi received FDA accelerated approval for Tzield in a new indication (stage 3 T1D in children 8-17 years), expanding its market opportunity. This represents a significant regulatory milestone as the first disease-modifying therapy for this patient population, addressing an unmet medical need affecting approximately 64,000 newly diagnosed patients annually in the US.
